name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.ConfigureBalanceHelper.AvoidFootWidth
summary: NB. Very sensitive. Avoid tries to not step across a line of the inside of the stance leg's foot. AvoidFootWidth = how much inwards from the ankle this line is in (m).
remarks:
Default value = 0.1f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 1.0f.
